projects.title: HousiFi - Realestate Tokenization
projects.description: Fractional real estate investment on Sepolia. Users pool a down payment by buying a majority (85%) or minority (15%) share of a property. Ownership and payouts are settled on-chain via ERC-20 property tokens and USDC.

projects.title: Domino - A Supply Chain Vulnerability Dashboard
projects.description: DOMINO is a supply chain vulnerability dashboard that models how disruptions to global commodity trade propagate through production chains and affect countries worldwide. Given eleven years of bilateral trade data from the BACI database (2014– 2024, approximately 100 million rows), we compute trade vulnerability metrics, construct commodity-level trade networks, run a four-step cascade simulation across 23,760 shock scenarios, and serve the precomputed results to an interactive dashboard. The data pipeline runs on Apache Spark on Google Cloud Dataproc with HDFS storage and Spark GraphFrames for graph computation. The backend is an async FastAPI service backed by MongoDB Atlas, and the frontend is a React/D3.js application centered on a rotatable 3D globe. The final simulation output is 1.3 million rows covering every combination of 30 countries, 72 commodity groups, and 11 years.

experience.title: Full Stack Software Dev Lead
highlights: Reduced RFQ response latency by 99.9%, from 6 weeks to 5 minutes per request, by architecting a cloud-native Agentic AI solution utilizing a React-based chat frontend and an Azure-based backend.

Fully automated the extraction and structured storage of vendor data by building the Control Tower AI agent using OpenAI LLMs, Azure Blob Storage, and Azure Functions, while leading all code review efforts.

Enhanced project cost estimation accuracy and transparency by developing the Rapid Cost RAG based LLM to provide automated cost predictions with data-backed reasoning for construction bids, with APIs to enable the frontend chat functionality.
Led sprint demos and stakeholder communication across the SDLC to ensure on time project delivery.

Resolved 4 of 9 tracked issues on a marketing campaign tracking tool, implementing frontend and backend fixes (React, Node.js) to improve campaign status visibility and reduce manual effort by 2 minutes per campaign tracked.
